message:
feat(abi): extend startup ABI definitions for unikernel bootstrap sequence

Add new startup ABI type definitions and initialization logic to
frankenlibc-abi/startup_abi.rs, expanding the unikernel bootstrap
surface for cross-platform startup coordination.

Sync beads issue tracker metadata with updated acceptance criteria
and verification gates across multiple issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
